noCompatibleAsset: No compatible download found for this platform
noCompatibleAssetManual: No package matches your current system architecture. Please download the correct installer from Releases.
readyToInstallDesc: Update has been downloaded. Click the button below to restart and install the update.

ijfw.pathIssueBody: IJFW is installed, but the ijfw command is not on PATH. Wayland can still use the local install.
ijfw.updateStarted: IJFW update started. Restart Wayland after it stages the new version.

errors.missingTag: Cannot verify this update: the release tag is missing. Please update from the Releases page.
errors.metadataMissing: Could not find signed update metadata (latest.yml) for this release. Refusing to open an unverified installer.
errors.assetNotInMetadata: The downloaded file "{{name}}" is not listed in the signed update metadata. Refusing to open an unverified installer.
errors.checksumMismatch: The downloaded update failed integrity verification (checksum mismatch) and was discarded. Do not run it. Please retry or download from the Releases page.
errors.githubApiFailed: Could not reach the update server (GitHub returned {{status}}). This is often a temporary rate limit. Please try again in a few minutes or check the Releases page.
errors.githubApiNotArray: The update server returned an unexpected response. Please try again later or check the Releases page.
errors.githubApiTimeout: The update check timed out. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.githubRateLimited: Too many update checks from your network right now. Please wait a few minutes and try again, or download from the Releases page.
errors.downloadFailed: The update download failed (server returned {{status}}). Please try again or download from the Releases page.
errors.downloadNoBody: The update download returned no data. Please try again or download from the Releases page.
errors.invalidUrl: The update download address is invalid. Please download from the Releases page.
errors.httpsOnly: Refusing to download the update over an insecure connection. Please download from the Releases page.
errors.hostNotAllowed: The update download host "{{host}}" is not trusted. Please download from the Releases page.
errors.redirectNoLocation: The update download was redirected without a destination. Please download from the Releases page.
errors.tooManyRedirects: The update download followed too many redirects. Please download from the Releases page.
errors.missingUrl: No download is available for this update. Please download from the Releases page.
errors.checkReturnedNull: Couldn't check for updates right now. Please try again later.

deferredDesc: This update will apply when your tasks finish, or when you quit. Install now anyway?
